composite.name: messageHeader
composite.description: Message identifiers and length of message root

type.name: schemaId
type.description: see if we can remove this for extra performance

type.name: version
type.description: see if we can remove this for extra performance

type.name: senderSinkId
type.description: Use as a routing key by messenger (see if we can ignore these for all subscription data)

type.name: senderMessengerId
type.description: A bit set identifying one of the 8 possible messengers within a service (0 represents the main messenger)

type.name: dstSinkId
type.description: Use as a routing key by messenger

type.name: dstMessengerSet
type.description: A bit set representing destination of this message, can be a maximum of all eight messengers within a service (0 represents the main messenger)

enum.name: ExecutionType
enum.description: should revise to see if we need all these

enum.name: OrderStatus
enum.description: i don't think we need to have pending status, that is state instead of status.

enum.name: Side
enum.description: do not change the values, it will be directly used as array index

message.name: PingSbe
message.description: ping and record latency between hops

message.name: SandboxSbe
message.description: Dump things here to trigger generation of sbe

message.name: HeartbeatSbe
message.description: Heartbeat (Need a message to reference TemplateType)

field.name: clientKey
field.description: seq of the message/event that this timer event is triggered for

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

field.name: secSid
field.description: either internal or external security ID

message.name: OMDTradeSbe
message.description: Trade (50) (based on OMDC) - put decoder directly on binary

message.name: OMDClosingPriceSbe
message.description: Trade (62) (based on OMDC) - put decoder directly on binary

message.name: OMDNominalPriceSbe
message.description: Trade (40) (based on OMDC) - put decoder directly on binary

field.name: fragmentSeq
field.description: we may use a smaller size field

data.name: description
data.description: Must decode this before decoding eventValues

data.name: description
data.description: Must decode this before decoding eventValues
